summary.lv: Arvato Systems meklē SOC analītiķi, kas veiks reāllaika drošības monitoringu, incidentu analīzi un eskalāciju, izmantojot SIEM, Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel/Defender un Azure, balstoties uz MITRE ATT&CK ietvaru.
summary.en: Arvato Systems is hiring a SOC Analyst to perform real-time security monitoring, incident analysis and escalation using SIEM, Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel/Defender and Azure, grounded in the MITRE ATT&CK framework.
